title: Missing-target multi-output CatBoost for short-history group 3
rationale: Group 3 has no 2022 labels while groups 1 and 2 have a highly correlated extra year. CatBoost's MultiRMSEWithMissingValues can learn capacity-normalized shared trees from all three outputs without pseudo-labeling the missing group-3 period.
expected_signal: The Q2-selected multi-output learner must beat the exact current group-3 surface on locked H2 with positive NMAE and FICR deltas, all seeds positive, at least four positive months, and a non-negative bootstrap lower tail. It must also beat the parent single-task CatBoost control to attribute the gain to multi-task transfer.
risk_notes: Shared trees can create negative transfer from the higher-capacity farms or optimize smooth RMSE at the expense of FICR thresholds. This run is diagnostic and cannot emit a submission.
